title: Write and run PHPUnit tests
description: Structure tests with PHPUnit, isolate framework dependencies, and run them through the project's configured command.
body: Steps: 1. Place tests under the configured tests/ directory with a matching PSR-4 test namespace. 2. Extend the right base case (PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase for pure units, the framework's TestCase for integration). 3. Arrange with fixtures/factories, mock collaborators via createMock, and act on the unit. 4. Assert on outcomes and exception types. 5. Run via the project's command (vendor/bin/phpunit or php artisan test / bin/phpunit). Rollback point: before changing phpunit.xml. Validation: the suite runs green and a deliberately broken assertion fails, proving tests actually execute.
